instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: cozy rainy library.

- remove sv_031-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_031-rect-011.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#caa04a"
- download-sv_031-ellipse-001.cx: 1247.0 -> 1180
- download-sv_031-ellipse-004.stroke-width: 9.0 -> 4
- download-sv_031-ellipse-002.opacity: 0.11 -> 0.25
